summary: Photographer Tools (Bookings Manager & Live Sessions Manager) testing complete. All 14 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend components verified with all features working correctly including Photo Tools sidebar menu, Create Session modal with split mode options, Join by Invite Code modal, and Live Now tab showing live photographers.

issues: Missing 'Description' or 'aria-describedby' for DialogContent - accessibility warning in console

Backend APIs.GET /api/photographer/{id}/bookings: PASS - Returns photographer bookings with all fields
Backend APIs.POST /api/photographer/{id}/bookings: PASS - Creates booking with invite_code when allow_splitting=true
Backend APIs.PATCH /api/bookings/{id}/status: PASS - Updates booking status, rejects invalid status with 400
Backend APIs.GET /api/photographer/{id}/active-sessio: PASS - Returns active session or null
Backend APIs.GET /api/photographers/live: PASS - Returns list of live photographers with location and price

Frontend - Photographer Bookings Manager.Tabs (Pending, Confirmed, Completed, Can: PASS - All 4 tabs visible and functional
Frontend - Photographer Bookings Manager.Create Session button: PASS - Opens Create New Session modal
Frontend - Photographer Bookings Manager.Create modal fields: PASS - Location, Date/Time, Duration, Max Participants, Price per Person
Frontend - Photographer Bookings Manager.Split Mode options (Friends Only, Open N: PASS - Both options visible and selectable
Frontend - Photographer Bookings Manager.Photo Tools menu in sidebar: PASS - Shows My Gallery, Bookings Manager, Live Sessions

Frontend - Photographer Sessions Manager.Go Live button: PASS - Visible with description 'Go live to let surfers find and join your session'
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Manager.Quick Settings section: PASS - Shows Location, Price per Join ($25), Auto-accept Surfers
Frontend - Photographer Sessions Manager.Session History section: PASS - Shows empty state with 'No Past Sessions'

Frontend - User Bookings page.Join Code button: PASS - Opens 'Join with Invite Code' modal
Frontend - User Bookings page.Live Now tab: PASS - Shows subscription tier info and live photographers with Jump In button

test_steps_executed: 4. Frontend: Injected photographer auth via localStorage
5. Frontend: Verified Bookings Manager page with all tabs and Create Session modal
6. Frontend: Verified Create Session modal with split mode options (Friends Only, Open Nearby)
7. Frontend: Verified Live Sessions Manager with Go Live, Quick Settings, Session History
8. Frontend: Verified User Bookings page with all tabs, Join Code modal, Live Now tab with live photographers
context_for_next_testing_agent: Photographer Tools fully working. Test file /app/backend/tests/test_photographer_bookings.py covers booking CRUD and live session APIs. Frontend uses localStorage authentication with key 'raw-surf-user'. Photo Tools menu only shows for photographer roles (Grom Parent, Hobbyist, Photographer, Approved Pro). There is 1 live photographer (Test Hobbyist at Atlantic Beach) available for Jump In testing.
